professor.title: Associate Professor
professor.biography_text: Dr. Xin Li has received the B.Sc. and M.S. degrees in computer science from Jilin University of China and the PhD degree in computer science in 2009 from Hong Kong Baptist University. She was a postdoctoral teaching fellow in the Department of Computer Science, Hong Kong Baptist University, from 2009 to 2010. She is currently an associate professor in School of Computer Science, Beijing Institute of Technology. She was also a (senior) visiting scholar at University of Technology Sydney and University of Waterloo in 2018 and 2007 respectively. She has published papers in internationally renowned conferences and journals, e.g., IJCAI, AAAI, ICML, ECML-PKDD, IEEE Transaction SMC Part B, TKDE, TNNLS, ACM TOIS. Her current research interests include Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Reinforcement Learning, as well as their applications to health care and robotics.
